item.title: Three in chase for key deal to help boost leading operator's offshore output
item.description: ONGC is developing multiple marginal fields off India's west coast, aiming to increase production from flagship asset

item.title: Production woes offshore Australia mount for Jadestone
item.description: Stag oilfield expected to remain offline until fourth quarter

item.title: Strike action looming at Australian LNG facilities
item.description: Protected industrial action threatened at three projects with combined capacity of 28.5 million tonnes per annum

item.title: New Zealand’s gas reserves hit historic low
item.description: Nation’s oil and gas exploration yet to be fully revived even as supplies dwindle

item.title: Venezuela's chief oil and gas regulator promises 'flexibility' for foreign investors
item.description: Paula Henao told US executives her country needs their help to complete a historic oil production turnaround

item.title: Shell shareholders reject green activist resolution
item.description: Follow This' resolution gathered less than 13% of votes at the British supermajor AGM on Tuesday

item.title: New leader lands at agency managing US oil and gas leases
item.description: Steve Pearce, a former congressman, will lead the US Bureau of Land Management

item.title: Poland moves closer to second LNG terminal with FSRU launch
item.description: Gdansk facility will enable Warsaw to increase gas import capacity to meet growing demand

item.title: McDermott eyes $130 billion projects pipeline over next two years
item.description: Middle East accounts for around a third of EPC contractor's commercial pipeline

item.title: Satellite data suggests QatarEnergy LNG train commissioning underway
item.description: Satellite intelligence company Kayrros says thermal signals detected at site indicate commissioning has started two months after facility shut down amid Middle East conflict

item.title: Petrobras launches crucial pipeline tender for exporting gas from Sergipe-Alagoas FPSOs
item.description: Project is needed to transport natural gas from the P-87 and P-81 FPSOs offshore Brazil

item.title: Shearwater wins OBN seismic job for UK's Jackdaw field
item.description: Two-month survey will gather data across an area of approximately 220 square kilometres

item.title: Leading seismic player issues proposals to strengthen financial position
item.description: Shearwater cautions seismic market will be constrained in 2026

item.title: Contractor fined for offshore rig fatality in the North Sea
item.description: Rig worker Jason Thomas went missing on 22 January 2023 from the jack-up rig Valaris 121, leading to an investigation by the HSE

item.title: Australia's gas reservation scheme 'creates more questions than answers'
item.description: Critics' concerns include how national scheme will operate alongside state-level policies and uncertainty over long-term domestic market balance

item.title: Woodside mulls pre-empting Inpex's gas megaproject deal
item.description: Japanese company had agreed to purchase PetroChina's 10.67% interest in Browse — Australia's largest unexploited offshore gas field

item.title: Woodside eyes swoop to beat Inpex bid for stake in gas megaproject
item.description: Japanese company had agreed to purchase PetroChina's 10.67% interest in Browse — Australia's largest unexploited offshore gas field

item.title: Leading joint venture wins major Malaysia FPSO prize
item.description: Project lies off the coast of Sabah, East Malaysia, and includes the Kikeh, Siakap North and Petai fields

item.title: Sinopec unveils China's first huge ultra-deep shale gas field
item.description: Field holds proven reserves of more than 235 billion cubic metres of shale gas

item.title: Pipeline reforms boost Australia’s CCS industry
item.description: Northern Territory passes landmark legislation allowing CO2 to flow through existing infrastructure

item.title: US extends sanctions waiver on Russian oil
item.description: Latest OFAC notice allows Russian oil on water to be sold until 17 June

item.title: US government official urges 'healthy dialogue' on new Venezuela deals
item.description: Department of Energy official urges delegates to network and cut deals to open Venezuela's oil and gas sector

item.title: Kazakh oilfield maintenance set to hit supplies to Europe
item.description: Kashagan oilfield in Caspian will shut production in June despite high energy prices fuelled by the Iran war

item.title: YPF plans $25 billion investment to boost Vaca Muerta oil production
item.description: Programme under RIGI initiative will focus on five blocks in the prolific shale play

item.title: Commercial oil inventories falling ‘rapidly’ and only have weeks left: IEA chief
item.description: Fatih Birol warns reserves ‘are not endless’ as energy markets continue recovery from US-Iran war

item.title: TotalEnergies' critical new FSO vessel arrives in Chinese yard
item.description: Adiana will replace ageing Unity FSO in Nigerian waters

item.title: US major agrees to gas supply deal for LNG development
item.description: ConocoPhillips to provide gas for Glenfarne’s Alaska LNG

item.title: Turkish Petroleum's latest drillship marks debut operation in Black Sea
item.description: Latest addition to six-strong fleet arrived at Sakarya gas field

item.title: Santos and Repsol rev up Alaskan oilfield
item.description: Pikka in Alaska comes on stream

item.title: The all-seeing project that could help unlock Japanese floating wind
item.description: Ocergy's design is already at the heart of two key floating wind projects in Europe and this California company with a distinctly French flavour is about to achieve an unusual entry into the Japanese market
